message:
fix(remote): use handle_id for presence check and add report rendering test

- Change report condition from handle_present flag to handle_id != 0
  for more reliable handle existence detection
- Add test remote_report_ack_handle_id_renders_without_handle_snapshot
  validating handle ID rendering when snapshot is absent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
